problem_statement: Users need a way to quickly find specific employees in the payroll dashboard. Currently, the employee directory displays all employees in a table without any filtering capability. As the employee roster grows, scrolling through the entire list to find a specific person becomes inefficient and time-consuming. A search feature would allow users to instantly locate employees by name or job title.

user_stories.i_want: to search for employees by name
user_stories.so_that: I can quickly find and manage a specific employee's record without scrolling through the entire directory

user_stories.i_want: to filter employees by job title
user_stories.so_that: I can easily view all employees with a particular role for reporting or organizational purposes

user_stories.i_want: search results to update as I type
user_stories.so_that: I can find employees faster without needing to press a search button

must_have: Search input field positioned above the employee table in the 'Employee directory' section
Filter the employee table rows in real-time as the user types
Match search query against employee name (case-insensitive)
Match search query against employee title (case-insensitive)
Show all employees when the search field is empty
Maintain existing table layout and styling consistency
should_have: Visual feedback when no employees match the search query
Clear/reset button or behavior to easily clear the search input
Preserve search state during the same page session
nice_to_have: Highlight matching text in search results
Search input placeholder text with usage hint (e.g., 'Search by name or title...')

acceptance_criteria: Verify a search input field appears above the employee directory table
Verify typing in the search field filters table rows to show only matching employees
Verify search matches employee names regardless of letter case
Verify search matches employee titles regardless of letter case
Verify partial matches are included in results (e.g., 'mar' matches 'Marcus')
Verify clearing the search input shows all employees again
Verify the employee cards section below the table is not affected by the search filter
Verify the page functions correctly with JavaScript disabled (graceful degradation or server-side fallback)
out_of_scope: Filtering the 'Edit employee records' card section (only the directory table is filtered)
Advanced search operators or boolean logic
Server-side search or API endpoint changes
Filtering by fields other than name and title (e.g., salary, manager, address)
open_questions: Should the search also filter the employee cards section, or only the directory table as currently specified?
Is there a minimum character count before filtering should begin, or should it filter from the first character?
Should there be keyboard shortcuts for focusing the search field (e.g., '/' or Ctrl+K)?
